["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h3",null,{"id":"debian--ubuntu-用户","children":"Debian / Ubuntu 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["首先信任 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://apt.grafana.com/","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://apt.grafana.com/"}]," 的 GPG 公钥："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"

",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["选择你希望安装的 Grafana 版本（与你的系统版本无关），将下方内容写入 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/grafana.list"}]]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Grafana 版本","items":[["Stable 稳定版本",{"version":"stable"}],["Beta 测试版本",{"version":"beta","beta":true}]]}],"templateId":"template-2","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/grafana.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"安装 Grafana"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"centos--redhat-用户","children":"Centos / Redhat 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["新建 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/grafana.repo"}],"，内容为"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Grafana 版本","items":[["Stable 稳定版本",{"version":"stable"}],["Beta 测试版本",{"version":"beta","beta":true}]]}],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"ini","filepath":"/etc/yum.repos.d/grafana.repo","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"再执行"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
